//: Standalone tsconfig for tsx-run TypeORM tooling (migrations CLI + ingestion pipeline). It deliberately does NOT extend ./.nuxt/tsconfig.json: tsx/get-tsconfig drops `experimentalDecorators` across that specific extends chain, which makes esbuild emit standard (TC39) decorators incompatible with TypeORM's legacy decorators. Passed explicitly via tsx --tsconfig in the db:* / docs:* scripts. The Nuxt runtime uses nitro.esbuild.options.tsconfigRaw; nuxt typecheck uses ./tsconfig.json.
